def positive_business_logic_inside_middleware():
    rule_id = "business_logic_inside_middleware"
    family = "architecture"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Middleware component encodes domain decision logic beyond cross-cutting concerns such as auth and logging."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
